title: Recruitment Consultant / Recruitment Delivery Partner (Niche Markets)
description:
About Us

SearchElect is a specialist recruitment firm operating in niche, high-demand markets, delivering recruitment solutions for mid to senior-level roles. Our model is search-led, insight-driven, and relationship-focused. We do not operate as a volume agency, and we do not measure success by box-ticking activity.

We partner closely with hiring managers and senior candidates, often engaging passive talent through consultative, high-trust conversations. Our recruitment cycles are longer, our roles are complex, and our work requires depth, patience, and credibility.

SearchElect is also intentionally future-facing. We actively encourage the use of artificial intelligence to improve decision-making, search quality, productivity, and candidate engagement. This is a company where experimentation is encouraged, learning is supported, and curiosity is expected.

The Role

We are hiring a Recruitment Consultant / Recruitment Delivery Partner to focus exclusively on the delivery of niche recruitment assignments.

This role is for a strategically minded recruiter, not a transactional operator. You will be expected to think in terms of markets, talent pools, candidate psychology, and long-term outcomes, rather than simply filling roles.

You will work closely with the founder/ceo, hiring managers, and senior candidates, acting as a trusted delivery and search partner throughout the recruitment lifecycle.

Key Responsibilities

  • Deliver end-to-end recruitment for niche, specialist, mid to senior-level roles
  • Approach recruitment as a strategic search exercise, not a transactional process
  • Conduct deep market research, talent mapping, and competitor analysis
  • Proactively hunt, engage, and convert passive candidates through outbound calls and direct sourcing
  • Manage long recruitment cycles with structured, proactive candidate engagement
  • Confidently handle tough, senior candidates with complex motivations and challenging questions
  • Advise hiring managers using market intelligence, not just CV submissions
  • Maintain exceptional standards of candidate care, communication, and credibility
  • Operate autonomously in a remote-first, cloud-based environment
  • Continuously refine delivery processes using data, insight, and technology
  • Strategic & AI-Driven Expectations
  • This role requires someone who:
  • Thinks in systems, strategy, and outcomes, not task completion
  • Challenges assumptions and looks for smarter ways to deliver results
  • Has a deep curiosity about artificial intelligence and its application in recruitment
  • Actively experiments with AI tools for:
  • Search and talent mapping
  • Candidate research and preparation
  • Workflow efficiency and productivity
  • Market intelligence and insights
  • Is brave enough to test AI in live environments, learn from failure, and iterate
  • Takes proactive ownership of self-training into advanced AI usage
  • SearchElect will fully support and invest in individuals who are willing to step forward into the evolving AI-driven recruitment landscape.

What We’re Looking For

  • Essential Experience
  • Proven background in recruitment with a demonstrated record of successful placements
  • Experience recruiting niche, specialist, or hard-to-fill roles
  • Strong capability in search, headhunting, and talent mapping
  • Comfortable managing ambiguity and longer hiring cycles
  • Ability to move agilely between markets and role types
  • Mindset & Attributes
  • Strategically minded – not a transactional box ticker
  • Mature, self-managed, and commercially aware
  • Confident communicator with senior-level candidates
  • Curious, analytical, and continuously learning
  • High ownership, discipline, and accountability
  • Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

Why Join SearchElect

  • High-trust, low-micromanagement culture
  • Strong emphasis on quality, depth, and credibility
  • Exposure to complex, senior-level recruitment assignments
  • Direct collaboration with an experienced founder and leadership
  • Remote-first flexibility with autonomy
  • A business that actively embraces AI, innovation, and future-ready recruitment

postedCompany.description:
SearchElect, incorporated in March 2011, is a specialist recruitment search firm serving the mid to senior level APAC technology market. We focus on an exceptional service and delivery quality to our clients by offering:

  • Tailored and personal service to each client with different needs;
  • Deep understanding of our clients business and industry;
  • Clear, accurate information and advice often becoming a partner not just a supplier.

(Employment agency licence no. 11S4620)
postedCompany.name: SEARCHELECT PTE. LTD.
